name: Shenzhen Tongyi Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Tongyi Industry Co., Ltd. provides chemical and electronic materials solutions. It offers chemical and electronic materials for smart mobile terminals, smart home appliances, LED lighting, and other segments. The company's products include high performance mobile phone housing materials, LED materials, elastomer materials, injection automation and intelligent systems, and celanese materials. Shenzhen Tongyi Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
